description_long: This is a roughly rectangular stone block with a dark, mottled surface featuring shades of black, gray, and brown. The block has uneven, jagged edges and a coarse texture, suggesting it was quarried or broken rather than finely cut. Its surface is predominantly matte with some subtle variations in reflectivity due to mineral inclusions. The block appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or internal structures. There are no visible engravings, markings, or artificial modifications on any side. The overall appearance suggests it is a natural stone, likely used as a barrier or obstacle in urban or landscaped environments.
description: A dense, dark, roughly rectangular stone block with jagged edges and a coarse, mottled surface. It appears solid and unmarked, suitable as an urban barrier or landscaping element.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the block, highlighting its dark coloration and rough, uneven surface.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a more vertical face with visible brownish mineral streaks and a jagged edge.
description_view_2: This side displays a prominent corner and a mix of dark and brownish tones, emphasizing the block's irregular shape.
description_view_3: This view presents a relatively flat, elongated surface with subtle color variations and a slightly smoother appearance compared to other sides.
attribute_weathering_pattern: Minor surface roughness and color variation suggest some exposure to the elements, but no significant erosion or moss growth is visible.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or loosely aligned with other blocks
